---
title: "案例演練個案"
author: "Peter Ho"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

> "以下案例來自官方公布之職災資訊，演練個案供學員宣導會時，實際應用5種分析方法演練用。"
> "應用個案係使用AI產出集合學員演練產出，集智而成，供事業單位在自身實際案例分析時參考用。"
> 
> --- Peter Ho

#### 捲夾案1
 - [演練個案1](https://1drv.ms/b/c/42c6b1caa79e56bf/EYeZ1zlnHPlIo2kjd2JtvIIBMQ5UZhmHdRNwt-pIryJszg?e=akRDGI)

#### 火災爆炸案
 - [演練個案1](https://1drv.ms/b/c/42c6b1caa79e56bf/Edc1tp9YtOFKu04eFPRgc8gBVM2favL00zmCwhRNnZYYKw?e=2Wtm5G)

#### 局限空間
 - [演練個案1](https://1drv.ms/b/c/42c6b1caa79e56bf/EdunYHcTGr5BkydQB9Y66pwBnFQEBTr8VtmXmH3K82xftw?e=SuIR37)

#### 倒塌崩塌案
 - [演練個案1](https://1drv.ms/b/c/42c6b1caa79e56bf/ET3ckL8BCPJNmzutgUJ9FeMBMtofamqWLj3ssOUdAYuoKw?e=gJZHXs)
 
#### 感電案
 - [演練個案1](https://1drv.ms/b/c/42c6b1caa79e56bf/EfmhuZwHErlFgo6ec0uRYVYB_HfVfrrl1SjCmw-jz7-M3g?e=IKCdyj)

#### 墜落案
 - [演練個案1](https://1drv.ms/b/c/42c6b1caa79e56bf/EaMQhyiTjeBFmjsUrvBhY3IBxYzrW-1A_uPeU-SwOZfAiw?e=k7Tm3C)

#### 熱疾病案
 - [演練個案1](https://1drv.ms/b/c/42c6b1caa79e56bf/EflVBc_vU5xIlipeb34FdC4BVTjBeFp8Re72nvos3U8Pgg?e=t5JvVk)
